response.justification: Candidate brings 14+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with exposure to high-throughput services (Sociomantic) and modern AI-agent infrastructure (Naver). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or telemetry/measurement systems that are central to this Principal-level growth engineering role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-team platform leadership at IC6 scale raise concerns about fit for a Principal IC position.
strengths: 14+ years of polyglot engineering experience across multiple languages and stacks
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/sec)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source platforms
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
Limited evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis work
Career level appears Senior/Staff rather than Principal/IC6 with cross-org influence
